Catalog.documentation: Filters access by a specific Catalog. Accepted values: [AWS, Sandbox]

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.documentation: Filters access by a tag key and value pair of a resource

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.documentation: Filters access by a tag key and value pair that is allowed in the request

aws:TagKeys.documentation: Filters access by a list of tag keys that are allowed in the request

traits.smithy.api#documentation: AWS Partner Central Revenue Measurement API for creating, managing, and tracking revenue attributions and their allocations with deal entities such as offers and opportunities.

UseFIPS.documentation: When true, send this request to the FIPS-compliant regional endpoint. If the configured endpoint does not have a FIPS compliant endpoint, dispatching the request will return an error.

Endpoint.documentation: Override the endpoint used to send this request

Region.documentation: The AWS region used to dispatch the request.

results.error: Invalid Configuration: FIPS and custom endpoint are not supported

UseFIPS.documentation: When true, send this request to the FIPS-compliant regional endpoint. If the configured endpoint does not have a FIPS compliant endpoint, dispatching the request will return an error.

Endpoint.documentation: Override the endpoint used to send this request

Region.documentation: The AWS region used to dispatch the request.

rules.error: Invalid Configuration: FIPS and custom endpoint are not supported

testCases.documentation: For custom endpoint with region not set and fips disabled
For custom endpoint with fips enabled

expect.error: Invalid Configuration: FIPS and custom endpoint are not supported

Updates an existing marketplace revenue share allocation. Supports modifying effective dates, revenue share percentage, and status with time-based mutability rules.
The catalog containing the allocation.
The AWS Marketplace product identifier for the parent revenue share.
The identifier of the allocation to update.
The current revision of the parent share. Must match for optimistic concurrency control.
A unique token to ensure idempotency of the update request.
The new effective start date. Must be the first day of a month. Only modifiable on future-dated allocations.
The new effective end date. Must be the last day of a month and on or after today.
The new revenue share percentage. Only modifiable on future-dated allocations.
The new status. Set to INACTIVE for soft-delete. Only modifiable on future-dated allocations.
The unique identifier of the updated allocation.
